prompt: Ejecute la nómina de marzo 2026 para el empleado Carlos López (carlos.lopez@example.org). El sueldo base es de 36000 NOK. Añada una bonificación de 8500 NOK.
notes: DIAGNOSTIC: Salary with bonus in Spanish. Tests: find/create employee, GET /salary/type to find Fastlønn (2000) and Bonus (2002), POST /salary/transaction with payslips containing employee ref, then salary specifications with correct salary type IDs.
